title: Most people get these 3 AI terms wrong
summary: Jeff Su clarifies three frequently misunderstood AI terms. Hallucination is reframed as the flip side of creativity, controlled by grounding mechanisms like web search. Context window is described as a fixed whiteboard that drops old information when full, and tokens are explained as the unit behind usage limits and prompt efficiency.
